name: HR managers in mid-sized companies using Workday, managing 100-500 employees tool
description: For HR managers in mid-sized companies using Workday, processing 100-500 employees, inaccurate forecasting causes retention issues. We provide a workforce analytics dashboard instead of manual spreadsheets and outdated HRIS reports.
target_audience: HR managers in mid-sized companies using Workday, managing 100-500 employees
problem_solved: Inability to accurately forecast headcount and manage compensation budgets, leading to retention issues.
